message:
feat(tools): wire storage layer into identity, messaging, and resource handlers

Connect git archive writes to tool handlers (best-effort, non-blocking):
- ensure_project now initializes the archive directory structure
- register_agent and create_agent_identity write agent profiles to git
  archive via try_write_agent_profile() helper
- whois fetches recent commits from git archive (replaces empty TODO vec)
- send_message and reply_message write message bundles to the archive
  (canonical + inbox/outbox + thread digest) via try_write_message_archive()
- identity_project resource resolves git info from archive
- tooling_locks resource calls collect_lock_status() (was returning empty)
- Resource directory/schemas/metrics/recent now respect tool_filter_allows

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
